approach: Single-file Node.js CLI blog generator with zero external dependencies. Implements YAML frontmatter parsing via regex, custom markdown-to-HTML converter supporting headings, code blocks, lists, links, images, blockquotes, bold/italic, and horizontal rules. Includes keyword-based syntax highlighting for JavaScript, Python, and Rust. Uses a simple {{ var }} template engine with layout/index/post/tag templates. CLI supports build (generates full static site to dist/), new <title> (scaffolds a new post with frontmatter), and serve (HTTP dev server). Posts sorted by date descending, tag pages auto-generated, responsive CSS with code highlighting theme.
